name: zsys_check_cpu_signature_mask
description: zSys::CheckCpuSignatureMask reads CPUID leaf 1 and returns whether the original CPU signature mask is present.
known_limits: VC6 12.00.8168 /O2 /Ob0 /Zp4 raw-CPU manifest COFF byte compare fails with 58 unmasked mismatches because the current portable source uses the compiler __cpuid helper shape, while the original inlines CPUID leaf 1 with explicit EBX/ECX/EDX preservation.
The native smoke verifies that the function returns a normalized boolean on the runtime CPU.
